title: Waterfall Cabin Building Set with Lights – 2539 PCS Retro Wooden House with Moving Waterfall & Nature Scene, Collector’s Display for Adults
features: 【Lively Waterfall with Rotating Mechanism】 A clever gear system creates a flowing two-stage waterfall – visually captivating and soothing to interact with. Paired with outdoor play like rafting, climbing, and photography for added fun.

【LED Lighting for Immersive Nature Ambience】 Features five lighting zones: cool-toned waterfall glow, flickering fireflies, floating lotus lanterns, and soft indoor lights in the cabin and viewing deck – a peaceful scene day or night.

【A Serene Retreat in Retro Style】 A classic wooden cabin with green rooftops, panoramic windows, and rock gardens. East-inspired details like a koto, scrolls, and plant sketches add culture and charm to the design.

【Perfect for Gifting or Creative Escapes】 A thoughtful gift for birthdays or holidays, or a personal wellness project to unwind and recharge. Great for adults, collectors, and decor enthusiasts alike.

【Premium Quality with 2-Year Warranty】 Built with durable materials and precise brick fit. Comes with 2 years of Lumibricks manufacturer warranty and reliable customer support – enjoy peace of mind while building or displaying.
